style_effects: Gentle, iridescent fairy dust particles drift lazily upward in a soft, pearlescent glow, forming delicate petal-shaped wisps around Snorlax's body. A warm, pastel pink aura pulses gently with a faint musical note vibration, casting a serene, dreamy light that refracts softly through the air like morning dew on petals. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
